title: Altran Foundation for Innovation
body: The Altran Foundation for Innovation is a vehicle of social action of the group Altran Technologies. Created in 1996, its main focus is promoting technological innovation for human benefit. One of the ways it does this is by holding an international scientific competition with a new theme every year, rewarding leaders of innovative technology-oriented projects.
